meta.notes: Fresh session on pika-sp-env (env_01X6A1Yp2uS7CknHMBGF8iiT). social-posting v1.0.7 installed via init_script (base64-embedded generate_caption.py + _retry.py). Agent pika-social-poster (agent_011CZvGxRhqM4ZgrXXkq6DcC) with nova3-common skill. T1+T2+T3+T4 dispatched simultaneously (14:50:48Z); container ran sequentially (T1=9.1s, T2=17.8s, T3=7.2s, T4=79.2s). T4 hit Anthropic read timeout (31.7s) on variations path → OpenAI fallback → single variation returned (expected 3). Session: sesn_011CZvH19AFxaV9wfs36K1ry.

test_input.name: pasta-tutorial-brief
test_input.description: video tutorial: how to cook perfect pasta at home — tested 5 different techniques

task.name: social-posting
task.purpose: Generate platform-optimized captions + hashtags for a cooking tutorial video brief
task.expected_output: JSON with caption, hashtags, full_post per test case; T4 expects 3 variations

install.notes: social-posting v1.0.7 scripts installed via pika-sp-env init_script (base64-encoded inline, no Pika hub download needed). init_script runs at container startup before session begins. nova3-common (skill_01WVFxRuNsjXYwW9Tz7Q2Nks) mounted at /workspace/skills/nova3-common.

asset_acquisition.notes: No asset download — social-posting is pure LLM skill.

steps.name: t1_x_casual
steps.notes: script_ms=9067. platform=x, tone=casual. llm_s=8.9 (anthropic). caption_len=216 hashtags=2 (#pasta, #cooking). Success. Preview: 'tested 5 pasta techniques so you don't have to. cold water start actually slaps...'

steps.name: t2_instagram_casual
steps.notes: script_ms=17755. platform=instagram, tone=casual. llm_s=17.6 (anthropic). caption_len=1005 hashtags_count=28. Full long-form micro-story caption. Success.

steps.name: t3_tiktok_funny
steps.notes: script_ms=7156. platform=tiktok, tone=funny. llm_s=7.0 (anthropic). caption_len=86. Short punchy Gen-Z hook. Success. Preview: 'I tested 5 pasta techniques so you don't have to (your Italian grandma lied to you fr)'

steps.name: t4_instagram_variations3
steps.notes: script_ms=79241. platform=instagram, tone=casual, variations=3. llm_s=14.4 (openai fallback). variations_returned=1 (expected 3). ⚠️ Anthropic timed out after 31.7s on variations pass → OpenAI fallback → variations generation failed (timeout) → returned single result. Second Anthropic attempt for single variation also failed (2.5s, connection closed) → OpenAI fallback succeeded (14.4s). caption_len=778 hashtags_count=30.

execution.notes: T1+T2+T3+T4 bash calls dispatched simultaneously at 14:50:48Z; container ran sequentially (T1→T2→T3→T4). Parallel-adjusted tool_calls_s = 117.819s (14:50:48 → 14:52:46). llm_overhead_s = 149.690 - 117.819 = 31.871s (initial dispatch ~17s + final synthesis ~15s).

delivery.notes: No CDN upload — social-posting outputs JSON to stdout only.
